title: ourisia caespitosa
intro: Ourisia caespitosa, commonly known as blue forget-me-not or creeping forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves and flowers containing compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Ourisia caespitosa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Ourisia caespitosa include infusions and decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy require further research and clinical trials.
